'''shamofo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:xylochlore|xylochlore]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| sh-m-f
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:xylochlore|xylochlore]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| shamofo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:shæmefeth|shæmefeth]] || [[word:shæmefej|shæmefej]] || [[word:shæmefesh|shæmefesh]] || [[word:shæmefe|shæmefe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:shamomofoth|shamomofoth]] || [[word:shamomofoj|shamomofoj]] || [[word:shamomofosh|shamomofosh]] || [[word:shamomofo|shamomofo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:shamofoth|shamofoth]] || [[word:shamofoj|shamofoj]] || [[word:shamofosh|shamofosh]] || [[word:shamofo|shamofo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:shamoffoth|shamoffoth]] || [[word:shamoffoj|shamoffoj]] || [[word:shamoffosh|shamoffosh]] || [[word:shamoffof|shamoffof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:shamofotho|shamofotho]] || [[word:shamofojo|shamofojo]] || [[word:shamofosho|shamofosho]] || [[word:shamofoko|shamofoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:shamofoth|shamofoth]] || [[word:shamofoj|shamofoj]] || [[word:shamofosh|shamofosh]] || [[word:shamofo|shamofo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:shamofothol|shamofothol]] || [[word:shamofojol|shamofojol]] || [[word:shamofoshol|shamofoshol]] || [[word:shamofokol|shamofokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:shamofothotho|shamofothotho]] || [[word:shamofojojo|shamofojojo]] || [[word:shamofoshosho|shamofoshosho]] || [[word:shamofoko|shamofoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:shamofothon|shamofothon]] || [[word:shamofojon|shamofojon]] || [[word:shamofoshon|shamofoshon]] || [[word:shamofokon|shamofokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:shamofothoro|shamofothoro]] || [[word:shamofojoro|shamofojoro]] || [[word:shamofoshoro|shamofoshoro]] || [[word:shamofokoro|shamofokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|654f723}}
